subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! On this day the lights of the Luminary of divine grace have encompassed the world, and the fragrances of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی امروز انوار نیر فضل الهی عالم را احاطه نموده و نفحات جود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for prosperity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
